events.agenda: In-person meetup with livestream available; single talk on entity matching using dbt.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt.
events.location: CBA Foundry, 1 Locomotive St, Eveleigh, NSW
events.raw_text:
Thu, Aug 11, 2022 · 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM AEST

Building an Entity Matching Solution using dbt. Lalit Pant, Staff Engineer & Arunkumar Kamalakarapandian, Senior Engineer, Chief Data & Analytics Office R&D, CBA

talks.description: How to define and build a generic Entity Matching Solution using dbt Projects, Models, Lineage, Tests, Documentation, Jinja scripting, and Macros to make the solution configuration-driven.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Building an Entity Matching Solution using dbt. This talk will cover how to define and build a generic Entity Matching Solution using dbt.
talks.speaker_title: Staff Engineer; Senior Engineer, Chief Data & Analytics Office R&D, CBA
talks.title: Building an Entity Matching Solution Using dbt

events.agenda: In-person meetup with livestream available; two talks on dimensional modeling and analytics transformation.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! This event will be a dinner social with talks.
events.location: Rokt, 300 Elizabeth St, Surry Hills, NSW
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jun 9, 2022 · 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM AEST

An introduction to dimensional modeling - Josh Devlin, Senior Analytics Engineer, Brooklyn Data Co.
Making data great again (at SafetyCulture) - Oscar Lukersmith & Justin Lane, SafetyCulture

talks.description: Learn about dimensional modeling, how it works, and its relevance in today's data landscape.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: An introduction to dimensional modeling. Summary: Learn about dimensional modeling, how it works, and its relevance in today's data landscape.
talks.speaker_title: Senior Analytics Engineer, Brooklyn Data Co.
talks.title: An Introduction to Dimensional Modeling

talks.description: How the analytics team at SafetyCulture completely rebuilt its transformation layer in 7 months to handle multiple changing source systems.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Making data great again (at SafetyCulture). How do you fix a plane mid-flight? This talk will walk through how the analytics team at SafetyCulture completely rebuilt its transformation layer in 7 months.
talks.speaker_title: Lead Analytics Engineer; Data Architecture and Modelling, SafetyCulture
talks.title: Making Data Great Again (at SafetyCulture)

events.agenda: In-person meetup with livestream available; talk on dbt in GIS data platforms.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data!
events.raw_text:
Thu, May 5, 2022 · 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM AEST

dbt in GIS world - Jonathan Mak, Data engineering team lead, Nearmap. At Nearmap we work with geospatial data everyday but for a long time we struggled to manage our GIS data.

talks.description: Nearmap's ongoing journey building a GIS data platform using dbt as the core of its geospatial data pipeline, applying the modern data stack to solve data silo and consistency problems.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt in GIS world. At Nearmap we work with geospatial data everyday but for a long time we struggled to manage our GIS data... we will discuss how dbt works as the core of our GIS pipeline
talks.title: dbt in GIS World

events.agenda: In-person meetup with livestream available; two talks on dbt structured logging and dbt project reflections.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data!
events.location: SafetyCulture, 72 Foveaux St, Surry Hills, NSW
events.raw_text:
Thu, Mar 31, 2022 · 5:45 PM to 7:45 PM AEDT

dbt on dbt - modelling the new structured logging format as events - Mike Robins, Co-Founder / CTO at Poplin Data
Green stack brown stack - Dean Jackson, CTO (and data dev), Azility

talks.description: How to use dbt models on top of dbt's own structured logging data to monitor and assess model performance, essentially building dbt on dbt.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt on dbt - modelling the new structured logging format as events. In this talk I'll walkthrough how you can use dbt models on top of dbt data and events by taking advantage of the new structured logging in dbt 1.
talks.title: dbt on dbt: Modelling the New Structured Logging Format as Events

talks.description: Reflections on two dbt projects, a greenfield IoT pipeline build and a brownfield refactor of a 15-year-old SQL Server database using dbt.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Green stack brown stack. Dean will reflect on his first two hands-on dbt projects. First, the greenfield... Then, the brownfield
talks.title: Green Stack Brown Stack

events.agenda: Online meetup with three talks on BigQuery pipelines, Fivetran + dbt streamlining, and data platform history.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data!
events.raw_text:
Thu, Sep 17, 2020 · 9:30 AM to 11:30 AM CEST

BigQuery dbt: data pipelines using Cloud Run and Cloud Scheduler - Hamza Khan, Consultant, Servian
Streamline your data platform - Dominic Colyer, Senior Solutions Engineer, Fivetran
Tale of two Data Platforms - Sana Sanai, Data & AI Specialist, Microsoft

talks.description: How to run dbt data pipelines on Google Cloud using Cloud Run and Cloud Scheduler with BigQuery.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: BigQuery dbt: data pipelines using Cloud Run and Cloud Scheduler. Please join this talk to learn how your dbt data pipelines can be run on Google Cloud using Cloud Run and Cloud Scheduler.
talks.title: BigQuery dbt: Data Pipelines Using Cloud Run and Cloud Scheduler

talks.description: Using Fivetran and dbt together to ingest data seamlessly and transform it into prebuilt analytic schemas orchestrated by Fivetran.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Streamline your data platform. Using Fivetran + dbt we will show you how to ingest data seamlessly, with no coding or configuration.
talks.title: Streamline Your Data Platform

talks.description: A journey from traditional data warehousing and data lakes to the modern data warehouse era, drawing on experience across Microsoft, Teradata, EY, and Cloudera.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Tale of two Data Platforms: Journey from data warehousing and data lakes to the modern data warehouse era. Sana is experienced strategist...
talks.title: Tale of Two Data Platforms: Journey from Data Warehousing and Data Lakes to the Modern Data Warehouse Era

events.agenda: In-person meetup hosted by Assembly Payments; two talks on Metabase export and startup dashboarding.
events.event_description: Assembly Payments have kindly invited us to their Wynyard Station offices!
events.location: Assembly Payments, Level 12, 201 Kent Street, Sydney
events.raw_text:
Thu, Mar 12, 2020 · 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM AEDT

Exporting dbt schema to Metabase - Mike Gouline, Lead Data Engineer, Assembly Payments
Data dashboarding for startups - adventures exploring Meltano and dbt - Allan Whatmough, Data Engineer, Open Colleges

talks.description: A tool to automatically export a dbt schema (descriptions, types, relationships) into Metabase, avoiding error-prone manual updates.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Exporting dbt schema to Metabase. Metabase, a brilliant open-source BI tool, allows you to define your data model on top of the database schema...
talks.title: Exporting dbt Schema to Metabase

talks.description: How Meltano, an open-source DataOps toolkit from GitLab, incorporates dbt to make data modelling and transformation easier for startups.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Data dashboarding for startups - adventures exploring Meltano and dbt. Meltano is an open-source tool developed by GitLab and is designed for startups and one-person shops.
talks.title: Data Dashboarding for Startups: Adventures Exploring Meltano and dbt

events.agenda: In-person meetup; two talks on dbt strategies/lessons learned and data redemption.
events.event_description: Canva have kindly invited us to host the Sydney DBT meetup at their Surry Hills offices.
events.location: Canva, 110 Kippax St, Surry Hills, NSW
events.raw_text:
Wed, Nov 27, 2019 · 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM AEDT

dbt strategies, mistakes and lessons learned - David Howell, Senior Data Engineer at Mathspace
Redemption with DBT and Snowflake. How to deal with bad data and poor design decisions - John Scott, CTO, RoundRect

talks.description: How Mathspace uses dbt across Redshift and BigQuery projects for data warehouse modeling, covering approaches, challenges, mistakes, and lessons learned.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt strategies, mistakes and lessons learned. In this talk David will discuss how they use dbt at Mathspace, with projects on both Redshift and Bigquery
talks.title: dbt Strategies, Mistakes and Lessons Learned

talks.description: How to deal with bad data and poor design decisions made in an operational RDBMS, using dbt and Snowflake for redemption.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Redemption with DBT and Snowflake. How to deal with bad data and poor design decisions made in your operational RDBMS.
talks.title: Redemption with dbt and Snowflake

events.agenda: In-person inaugural meetup; three talks on dbt CI/CD, dbt at Canva, and the analytics engineering discipline at Airtasker.
events.event_description: Thoughtworks have kindly invited us to host the inaugural Sydney DBT meetup at their offices.
events.raw_text:
Wed, Oct 9, 2019 · 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM AEDT

Getting up and running with DBT and other CI/CD considerations - Peter Hanssens, Data Engineer
Intro to DBT and using DBT for data warehouse loads - Jose Galarza & Krishna Naidu, Canva
From data engineer to analytics engineering - Dan Gooden & Rifat Majumder, Airtasker

talks.description: Options for running dbt including Fargate, Google Cloud Build, and deploying dbt docs to Netlify, plus other CI/CD considerations.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Getting up and running with DBT and other CI/CD considerations. Peter will go through a couple of options of running DBT including Fargate, Google Cloud Build
talks.title: Getting Up and Running with dbt and Other CI/CD Considerations

talks.description: Why Canva chose dbt and how they use it for data warehouse loads, including loading data from their data lake using dbt/Snowflake features.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Intro to DBT and using DBT for data warehouse loads. Jose and Krishna will take us through why they have chosen DBT at Canva and how they are using it.
talks.title: Intro to dbt and Using dbt for Data Warehouse Loads

talks.description: Airtasker's journey from data engineering to the emerging analytics engineering discipline made possible with tools like dbt, covering their workflow and challenges.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: From data engineer to analytics engineering. Join Dan Gooden and Rifat Majumder from Airtasker as they detail the journey from data engineering to the emerging analytics engineering discipline
talks.speaker_title: Data Lead, Airtasker; Analytics Engineer, Airtasker
talks.title: From Data Engineer to Analytics Engineering

events.agenda: In-person meetup; four talks on dbt updates, MSFT Build recap, Fishtown Analytics APAC team intro, and GIS/security pipelines.
events.event_description: We will be in-person this month with a dbt meetup - stay tuned for further details!
events.location: Microsoft Reactor Sydney, 11 York St, Sydney
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jun 9, 2021 · 5:45 PM to 7:45 PM AEST

Welcome back, DataEngBytes, what's new in dbt - Peter Hanssens
MSFT Build recap - Simon Waight
Introducing the Fishtown Analytics team in APAC - Kelly Hotta
Hype words assemble - dbt, Snowflake and Cybersecurity - Jonathan Mak, Nearmap

talks.description: An update on what's new in dbt, welcoming back the DataEngBytes community.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Welcome back, DataEngBytes, what's new in dbt - Peter Hanssens, Cloud Shuttle
talks.title: Welcome Back, DataEngBytes: What's New in dbt

talks.description: A recap of announcements from Microsoft Build relevant to Azure and data engineering.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: MSFT Build recap - Simon Waight, Azure Pro Developer Lead for Microsoft
talks.title: MSFT Build Recap

talks.description: Introducing the Fishtown Analytics (dbt Labs) team in APAC.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Introducing the Fishtown Analytics team in APAC - Kelly Hotta, APAC Sales @ dbt
talks.title: Introducing the Fishtown Analytics Team in APAC

talks.description: How Nearmap built a pipeline around dbt models to monitor and alert on AWS CloudTrail events using dbt, Snowflake, and AWS, increasing visibility of security-related changes.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Hype words assemble - dbt, Snowflake and Cybersecurity. With dbt, Snowflake and some AWS work we built a pipeline around dbt models to provide monitoring and alerts on AWS Cloudtrail events
talks.title: Hype Words Assemble: dbt, Snowflake and Cybersecurity

events.agenda: Online meetup; two talks on dbt orchestration and dbt/Fivetran/Azure data platform strategy.
events.event_description: We will be online again this month with a dbt meetup - stay tuned for further details!
events.raw_text:
Wed, Feb 17, 2021 · 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM CET

Principles for your company's first data team - James Peterson, Data Engineer, Endeavour Drinks
What the fluff is SQLFluff? - Pip Sidaway, Analytics Engineer, nib

talks.description: Tips for setting data foundations for a company's first data team: mindset, prioritisation, and what to do first, second, and third.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Principles for your company's first data team. Tips for setting data foundations: The mindset you need to spread, what to do first/second/third
talks.title: Principles for Your Company's First Data Team

talks.description: An introduction to SQLFluff, a SQL linting tool, and how it can be used with dbt.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: What the fluff is SQLFluff? SQLFLuff is a linting tool, but what does that mean? How could it be used with dbt?
talks.title: What the Fluff is SQLFluff?

events.agenda: Online meetup; two talks on reusable dbt macros/packages and data team strategy.
events.event_description: We will be online again this month with a dbt meetup - stay tuned for further details!
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jul 28, 2021 · 4:00 AM to 6:00 AM CEST

Making a macro: When and how to build and distribute reusable transformation logic - James Weakley, CEO @ Omnata
Data - what should the humans do? - Chris Jenkins, Data & Information Manager, Trustpower

talks.description: The journey from SQL snippets in a blog post to a complete, reusable dbt package, using the dbt-ml-preprocessing package as an example.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Making a macro: When and how to build and distribute reusable transformation logic. Using the dbt-ml-preprocessing package as an example, James will step through the journey
talks.title: Making a Macro: When and How to Build and Distribute Reusable Transformation Logic

talks.description: Zooming out from tooling details to the overall philosophy of data and analytics, with lessons from a data transformation journey at Trustpower.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Data - what should the humans do? This talk zooms out for a moment to the overall philosophy of data & analytics
talks.title: Data - What Should the Humans Do?
